title: hedeoma scutellarioides
intro: Hedeoma scutellarioides, also known as American pennyroyal, is a perennial herb native to North America. It is a member of the mint family and is known for its medicinal properties, which include its ability to act as an antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antispasmodic. The health benefits of American pennyroyal include its potential to relieve digestive issues, reduce menstrual cramps, and alleviate respiratory problems. American pennyroyal can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and salves, and is often dried or used fresh in traditional medicine practices.
